name: MS Graph for SharePoint
description: This app connects to SharePoint using the MS Graph API to support investigate and generic actions

actions.name: Copy Drive Item
actions.description: Using SharePoint Site ID app config value, and given source_drive_id, copy source_item_id into a folder identified with dest values

parameters.name: source_item_id
parameters.description: ID for drive item that needs to be copied

parameters.name: source_drive_id
parameters.description: Drive ID that contains the source item to copy. If no id is specified the default drive will be used

parameters.name: dest_drive_id
parameters.description: Drive ID that contains target folder to copy item to. If no id is specified the default drive will be used

parameters.name: dest_folder_id
parameters.description: ID of target folder to copy drive item to

parameters.name: file_name
parameters.description: Optional new folder/file name for the copy. If not provided will use the original name

actions.name: Create Folder
actions.description: Create new Drive item Folder using SharePoint site in asset config and provided Parent Item ID

parameters.name: parent_item_id
parameters.description: Parent Drive Item ID

parameters.name: folder_name
parameters.description: Name of newly created folder

parameters.name: drive_id
parameters.description: ID of drive to create folder in. If no id is specified the default drive will be used

parameters.name: drive_id
parameters.description: ID for drive that folder lives in. If no id is specified the default drive will be used

parameters.name: folder_path
parameters.description: Path of the folder to query

actions.name: List Drives
actions.description: Fetch the available drives (libraries) under a SharePoint site

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of drives to return

actions.name: List Drive Children
actions.description: List the items in a drive folder by drive ID or search for a specific file name if provided

parameters.name: drive_id
parameters.description: ID of drive to list. If no id is specified the default drive will be queried

actions.name: List Sites
actions.description: Fetch the details of the SharePoint sites

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of sites to return

actions.name: List Lists
actions.description: Fetch the available lists under a SharePoint site

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of sites to return

actions.name: Get List
actions.description: Retrieves a list from a SharePoint Site

parameters.name: list
parameters.description: Title or ID of the list to retrieve

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of list items to return

actions.name: Add Item
actions.description: Add an item to a list on a SharePoint Site

parameters.name: list
parameters.description: Title or ID of the list to add an item

parameters.name: item
parameters.description: JSON string of item

actions.name: Update Item
actions.description: Update an item in a list on a SharePoint Site

parameters.name: list
parameters.description: Title or ID of the list to which the item belongs

parameters.name: item_id
parameters.description: ID of the item to update

parameters.name: item
parameters.description: JSON string of item

actions.name: Get File
actions.description: Retrieves a file from a SharePoint site

parameters.name: file_name
parameters.description: File name to retrieve

parameters.name: file_path
parameters.description: Folder path on site

parameters.name: drive_id
parameters.description: The file is searched in this drive. If no drive is specified, the default drive will be used

actions.name: Remove File
actions.description: Removes a file from a SharePoint site

parameters.name: file_name
parameters.description: File name to remove

parameters.name: file_path
parameters.description: Folder path on site

parameters.name: drive_id
parameters.description: The file is searched in this drive. If no drive is specified, the default drive will be used

actions.name: Remove Folder
actions.description: Removes a folder from a SharePoint site

parameters.name: folder_path
parameters.description: Folder path on site

parameters.name: drive_id
parameters.description: The file is searched in this drive. If no drive is specified, the default drive will be used
